content.en:
At this time, the Quasi-Dao Realm was divided into true kingdoms, and ninety percent of the territory was covered by the true country, and only one percent of the territory was owned by those small forces with extraordinary backgrounds, or was a resource-poor land, and an area that the true country could not look down on.

Of course.

Some territories were still stationed in branches by the major true powers, gradually forming patches of trading areas and chaotic areas.

With the passage of time, the division of forces in the entire quasi-Dao realm was settled.

When the Quasi-Dao Realm was just promoted, the resources at this time were very abundant, countless True Monarchs and Heavenly Monarchs were looking for resources, and the Terran was also collecting resources.

Ye Tian didn't retreat anymore and ran out to find resources.

With the help of countless people of the Terran race, Ye Tian's speed of finding resources was very fast, although those Terran cultivators were weak, but there were too many people, and the treasures he found were naturally more.

In addition, Ye Tian has the Great Realm Shift, shuttling through small worlds, and his speed completely surpasses that of other True Monarchs, so the speed of collecting resources is also among the forefront.

For 100,000 years, armies of resources have been on the move.

After that, the resources began to become scarce, and although new resources were born, it took time, so a large number of True Monarchs began to retreat and cultivate.

And the human race began to advance by leaps and bounds under such circumstances, one Heavenly Monarch after another was born, and there were more and more half-step true spirit powerhouses.

Of course, no matter how many Heavenly Monarchs and really many half-step True Spirits are of little use, in the eyes of the top True Monarchs, these people are all ants.

What the human race really lacks is that kind of rare peerless genius, at least a genius who can be promoted to the rank of seven or eight star gods, and only such geniuses can hope to become truly powerhouses.

It would be even better if there was another transcendent.

......

Ye Tian did not live in the Void Heaven Hall now, but built a huge palace in his own territory, and asked Longhai Zhenjun and the others to arrange an amazing defensive array and other various formations to bless.

Anyway, the real country is built, as long as it is within the scope of the real country, the security is no problem, even if someone attacks, the true monarchs in the real country can quickly support.

Therefore, Ye Tian didn't need to practice in the Void Heaven Palace, he could just cultivate in his own territory.

Cultivation room.

Ye Tian was impacting the True Monarch realm at the moment.

He was already about to complete ten percent of the fusion, and once the physical body and the Chaos True Spirit were completely fused, the shackles that hindered him would be broken, and the True Spirit and the physical body would not be separated from each other.

And Ye Tian is different from the ordinary half-step true spirit, his essence and spirit are one, the true spirit and the physical body are fused, and he will also indirectly fuse with the divine soul and divine power, which is equivalent to the fusion of the essence and the true spirit, in this way, the benefits brought by the breakthrough are too great.

"The true spirit realm is the stage of constantly improving the strength of the true spirit, the true spirit at the beginning is still relatively weak, but the true spirit stage can continue to refine the true spirit, which is equivalent to refining the physical body. In the previous realm, although the physical body was important, it was far inferior to the true spirit level. It is rumored that those top true monarchs are invincible in the flesh, because only when the physical body is tempered to the extreme, and the future avenue is fused with the divine soul, the physical body can be accommodated, otherwise if the physical body is weak, it will explode directly, and there is no way to impact the realm of the avenue. At the level of the True Spirit, the physical body is too important, and the Chaos Alchemy is also very important. What I have condensed is the Chaos True Spirit, so I must refine my physical body to a level far beyond that of other True Monarchs before I can impact the Great Dao Realm, otherwise my physical body will definitely explode!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, the impact avenue realm was still too far away from him.

What he wants to impact now is the True Spirit Realm!

Rumble!!!!

The physical body and the true spirit were fused, and Ye Tian's realm officially broke through to the realm of the true spirit.

Under normal circumstances, the physical body of a lower-grade true spirit will be increased by two times when it is promoted to the true spirit realm, the physical body will be increased by three times when a middle-grade true spirit is promoted to the true spirit realm, the physical body will be increased by five times if the high-grade true spirit realm is promoted to the true spirit realm, and the physical body will be increased by a factor of fifteen when the supreme true spirit is promoted to the true spirit realm, and the quasi-supreme true spirit will be promoted to the true spirit realm and the physical body will be increased by a factor of fifteen.

This is also the reason why many Tianjiao want to condense the Supreme True Spirit and the Quasi-Supreme True Spirit.

And the Ten Star Gods are expected to condense the Supreme True Spirit in the future, and no one knows that once the Supreme True Spirit is promoted to the True Spirit Realm, the physical body will be improved by thirty times.

This is a very exaggerated increase, and it is a base increase, and it is a gap that will never be bridged.

It's a pity that people who can condense the supreme true spirit are too rare, and there may not be a single person in an era, even if it is a genius like Longhai Zhenjun, it is only a quasi-supreme true spirit condensed.

And Ye Tian is different, what he condenses is the Chaos True Spirit, which is above the Supreme True Spirit.

Therefore, Ye Tian was very curious about what the physical body would increase by a factor after he was promoted to the True Spirit Realm.

Soon, the physical body began to metamorphose.

Ye Tian took out countless resources, plus the chaotic vitality here was also very strong, although it was not as good as the Void Heaven Palace, it also condensed a small lake of chaotic vitality.

Boom!

The Chaotic Yuan Qi Lake poured into Ye Tian's body, and the energy that those resources turned into pure energy also poured into Ye Tian's body, accelerating the transformation of his physical body!

Twice!

Five times over!

Ten times over!

Fifteen times!

Thirty times!

......

"It surpasses the physical body enhancement effect brought by the promotion of the Supreme True Spirit!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Soon, his physical body had increased fiftyfold, and it wasn't over yet.

Sixty times!

Seventy times!

Eighty times!

After a long time, Ye Tian's physical body gradually stabilized, and his ascension became slower and slower, until he could no longer improve in the slightest.

At this time, the transformation that belongs to Ye Tian is really over.

"100 times!"

Ye Tian took a deep breath.

His physical body has now increased 100 times, what an ungodly ascension!

Moreover, his divine soul has also increased tenfold, and his chaotic divine power has also been refined by more than ten times, and the total amount has only increased by several times.

But this is only a breakthrough, once he stabilizes the realm, and a little more cultivation, his strength will increase significantly.

In short, Ye Tian's current strength is too strong, far surpassing before.

If he used his current strength to invade the Demon Sound Sect, one move would be enough to blow up the entire Demon Sound Sect headquarters.

"However, there is still a big gap between my current strength and those true monarchs on the list of true monarchs. Those True Monarchs on the True Monarch List are all characters who have cultivated for countless years, or even several eras ago, and all of them can leapfrog and kill True Ancestors!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But he is very confident, and it won't be long before he has a place on the True Monarch list.
